creator: barzog@telecom.by
text:
With suggested replacing USE_LDCONFIG to USE_LDCONFIG32 in ports 
Makefile hpacucli starts.
[root@albatros2 /usr/ports/sysutils/hpacucli]# sudo portupgrade -Nf hpacucli
--->  Reinstalling 'hpacucli-7.50_2' (sysutils/hpacucli)
--->  Building '/usr/ports/sysutils/hpacucli'
===>  Cleaning for hpacucli-7.50_2
===>  Extracting for hpacucli-7.50_2
=> MD5 Checksum OK for hpacucli-7.50.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for hpacucli-7.50.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for hpacucli-7.50_2
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for hpacucli-7.50_2
===>   hpacucli-7.50_2 depends on shared library: c.4 - found
===>   hpacucli-7.50_2 depends on shared library: c.5 - found
===>  Configuring for hpacucli-7.50_2
--->  Backing up the old version
--->  Uninstalling the old version
--->  Deinstalling 'hpacucli-7.50_2'
[Updating the pkgdb <format:dbm_hash> in /var/db/pkg ... - 85 packages 
found (-1 +0) (...) done]
--->  Installing the new version via the port
===>  Installing for hpacucli-7.50_2
===>   hpacucli-7.50_2 depends on shared library: c.4 - found
===>   hpacucli-7.50_2 depends on shared library: c.5 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>   Running ldconfig
/sbin/ldconfig -32 -m /usr/local/lib/compaq/hpacucli
===>   Installing 32-bit ldconfig configuration file
===>   Registering installation for hpacucli-7.50_2
===>  Cleaning for hpacucli-7.50_2
--->  Cleaning out obsolete shared libraries
[Updating the pkgdb <format:dbm_hash> in /var/db/pkg ... - 86 packages 
found (-0 +1) . done]

But it doesn't detect any controllers (in this server I'll have 
435129-B21 SA E500 controller with MSA60 attached/E500 with two MSA60 
attached and E200 with MSA20 attraced)
